codeReview.summary: The feature commit adds focused integration coverage for the requested prompt-entry and non-interactive assertions, and the routed command flow in cli/src/cli.ts plus guard/prompt sequencing in cli/src/interactive.ts matches VAL-CORE-006/007/011 and VAL-PROMPTS-007/008/009/010. Non-interactive safety is enforced before prompt intro, -y/--all paths bypass interactive() for all family commands, --user preselects scope via config.userLevel, family commands enter direct category flows, and target selection is gated to skills/rules contexts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation contract evidence for prompt-routing assertions emphasizes terminal-session recordings, but the added checks for VAL-PROMPTS-007/008/009 are primarily source-inspection assertions. Mission shared docs do not explicitly clarify when code-inspection is an acceptable substitute for interactive transcript evidence.

The cli-refactor-worker procedure mandates 'tests first (red)', but this feature was validation-oriented with already-correct runtime behavior; handoff feedback indicates the skill should explicitly allow test-only verification features that start green.

summary: Pass. Reviewed feature cli-core-prompt-entry-routing-and-noninteractive-safety at commit 1076c4d, including handoff, transcript skeleton, diff, and command routing/prompt code. No blocking code issues found for the required validation IDs; noted two shared-state/process observations for contract/skill clarity.
